text:
Hi all! I'm Andrew, a research software specialist at University of Michigan's Advanced Research Computing and (presently) ~7/8ths of a bioinformatics MS. Prior to this position, I was working directly on several R packages for the Welch Lab (also at UM) one of which has some very _fun_ compilation requirements.

I joined this slack because as a result of said package's requirements, I am fairly familiar with the rtools codebase and have contributed a patch or two to that. I figured I should probably put my name out there in the event that more devpower is wanted for rtools maintenance in the wake of recent events.

Happy to be here and look forward to further chatting!
